name: gotcha-skills
description: GOTCHA! 找茬 — Systematic self-critique for AI coding agents. Proactively audits your own output for bugs, edge cases, security vulnerabilities, and design issues before the user finds them. One focused skill: find what's broken, report it clearly, let the user decide what to fix.

plugins.name: gotcha
plugins.description: GOTCHA! 找茬 — Systematic self-critique protocol. Six-category audit (Correctness, Security, Robustness, Performance, Design, Completeness). Three intensity levels. One-shot trigger → audit → report → user decides what to fix.
